heading: Grants to and contracts with the Service, Indian tribes, tribal organizations, and urban Indian organizations to facilitate outreach, enrollment, and coverage of Indians under Social Security Act health benefit programs and other health benefits programs
label: 1644 Grants to and contracts with the Service, Indian tribes, tribal organizations, and urban Indian organizations to facilitate outreach, enrollment, and coverage of Indians under Social Security Act health benefit programs and other health benefits programs

children.heading: Indian tribes and tribal organizations
children.label: a Indian tribes and tribal organizations

children.text: to enroll for benefits under a program established under title XVIII, XIX, or XXI of the Social Security Act [ et seq., 1396 et seq., 1397aa et seq.] and other health benefits programs; and42 U.S.C. 1395

with respect to such programs for which the charging of premiums and cost sharing is not prohibited under such programs, to pay premiums or cost sharing for coverage for such benefits, which may be based on financial need (as determined by the Indian tribe or tribes or tribal organizations being served based on a schedule of income levels developed or implemented by such tribe, tribes, or tribal organizations).
to determine the population of Indians eligible for the benefits described in subsection (a);
to educate Indians with respect to the benefits available under the respective programs;
to provide transportation for such individual Indians to the appropriate offices for enrollment or applications for such benefits; and
to develop and implement methods of improving the participation of Indians in receiving benefits under such programs.

children.heading: Application to urban Indian organizations
children.label: c Application to urban Indian organizations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The provisions of subsection (a) shall apply with respect to grants and other funding to urban Indian organizations with respect to populations served by such organizations in the same manner they apply to grants and contracts with Indian tribes and tribal organizations with respect to programs on or near reservations.

children.label: A
children.text: consistent with the requirements imposed by the Secretary under subsection (b);

children.label: B
children.text: appropriate to urban Indian organizations and urban Indians; and

children.label: C
children.text: necessary to effect the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Facilitating cooperation
children.label: d Facilitating cooperation
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, shall develop and disseminate best practices that will serve to facilitate cooperation with, and agreements between, States and the Service, Indian tribes, tribal organizations, or urban Indian organizations with respect to the provision of health care items and services to Indians under the programs established under title XVIII, XIX, or XXI of the Social Security Act [ et seq., 1396 et seq., 1397aa et seq.].42 U.S.C. 1395

children.heading: Agreements relating to improving enrollment of Indians under Social Security Act health benefits programs
children.label: e Agreements relating to improving enrollment of Indians under Social Security Act health benefits programs
children.text: For provisions relating to agreements of the Secretary, acting through the Service, for the collection, preparation, and submission of applications by Indians for assistance under the Medicaid and children’s health insurance programs established under titles XIX and XXI of the Social Security Act [ et seq., 1397aa et seq.], and benefits under the Medicare program established under title XVIII of such Act [ et seq.], see subsections (a) and (b) of section 1139 of the Social Security Act [].42 U.S.C. 139642 U.S.C. 139542 U.S.C. 1320b–9

children.heading: Definition of premiums and cost sharing
children.label: f Definition of premiums and cost sharing

children.heading: Premium
children.label: 1 Premium
children.text: The term “premium” includes any enrollment fee or similar charge.

children.heading: Cost sharing
children.label: 2 Cost sharing
children.text: The term “cost sharing” includes any deduction, deductible, copayment, coinsurance, or similar charge.
